verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the location as South Korea based on strong, mutually reinforcing evidence across all domains. The synthesis explicitly listed the key visual markers (Hangul, -gil suffix, LS Tractor, utility pole stripes) and correctly noted the consistency of the agents' high-confidence assessments.
